records.description: Canonical POLL-0 emission intake process; records pollution source events and updates deterministic P0 regional pollutant mass totals.
Canonical field mutation process for deterministic field-layer updates under declared field update policies.
Canonical EARTH-2 seasonal climate tick; recomputes deterministic Earth surface temperature/daylight proxies for due update buckets and persists derived climate-band overlays.
Canonical POLL-1 dispersion tick; applies deterministic coarse diffusion/decay/deposition updates and exposure accumulation stubs.
Canonical POLL-2 diegetic sensor measurement process; samples local concentration fields and emits observation/knowledge-receipt artifacts.
Canonical POLL-2 compliance reporting tick; computes observed statistics, emits REPORT artifacts, and dispatches institutional reports through SIG.

Canonical SYS-0 collapse process; validates deterministic collapse eligibility, captures system state vector, validates declared boundary invariants, and replaces internal assembly graph with a macro capsule placeholder.

Canonical SYS-5 certification evaluation process; validates interface/invariants/spec/safety/degradation inputs deterministically and emits certification result rows with optional certificate issuance.
Canonical SYS-0 expand process; restores deterministic internal graph from serialized state vector, validates provenance anchor hash, and records expand event artifacts.
Canonical SYS-7 forensics process; deterministically evaluates bounded system cause chains and emits epistemically redacted derived explain artifacts without mutating canonical truth.
Canonical SYS-3 ROI scheduler tick; deterministically evaluates desired system tiers, performs budgeted collapse/expand transitions, and logs tier transition events and decisions.

Canonical SYS-2 macro capsule runtime tick; evaluates macro model bindings deterministically, applies boundary outputs through process-governed pathways, and logs forced-expand events when validity/error bounds require higher fidelity.
Canonical SYS-6 deterministic health aggregation tick; aggregates bounded hazard/entropy signals into system health state rows and logs deterministic degrade decisions.

Canonical SYS-6 reliability evaluation tick; evaluates macro reliability profiles against system health state, emits warning/failure outputs, forced-expand requests, and deterministic safe fallback actions.

Canonical SYS-4 template instantiation process; compiles registered system templates deterministically, emits planning/commitment artifacts through CTRL/MAT pathways, and creates micro/macro/hybrid system entries without prefab bypass.
Canonical COMPILE-0 submission process; deterministically compiles supported source graphs into derived compiled models with equivalence proofs and declared validity domains.
Canonical CHEM process-run lifecycle start; creates deterministic process-run state and start-event artifacts for governed industrial workflows.
Canonical CHEM process-run lifecycle tick; evaluates deterministic process progression, updates quality/yield outputs, and records energy/emission ledger artifacts.
Canonical CHEM process-run lifecycle end; closes deterministic run state and emits completion records for provenance, replay, and compactable process audit trails.
Canonical PROC-7 experiment start process; validates experiment definition and opens deterministic experiment run binding for epistemic process discovery.
Canonical PROC-7 experiment completion process; derives deterministic experiment result reports from measured observations and emits subject-bound receipts.
Canonical PROC-7 candidate promotion process; promotes a derived candidate process definition to defined status when deterministic replication and QC gates pass.
Canonical PROC-7 reverse engineering action process; executes deterministic disassemble/assay/scan workflows and emits canonical reverse engineering records.

Canonical PROC-8 software pipeline execution process; deterministically executes verify/compile/test/package/sign/deploy steps, records software artifacts, and routes deploy through SIG-governed transport outputs.
Canonical LOGIC-1 signal value update process with deterministic slot ordering.
Canonical LOGIC-1 pulse emission process that records bounded edge lists.
Canonical LOGIC-3 process that creates an empty LogicNetworkGraph binding through the shared NetworkGraph substrate.
Canonical LOGIC-3 process that adds a node payload to a declared LogicNetworkGraph.
Canonical LOGIC-3 process that adds a typed edge payload to a declared LogicNetworkGraph.
Canonical LOGIC-3 process that removes an edge from a declared LogicNetworkGraph.
Canonical LOGIC-3 process that validates a LogicNetworkGraph, classifies loops, and emits explain artifacts.
Canonical LOGIC-6 process that deterministically compiles a validated LogicNetworkGraph into a proved compiled artifact and binds the resulting references back onto the network.
Canonical LOGIC-7 process that performs a bounded, instrumentation-gated probe read against a logic measurement point.
Canonical LOGIC-7 process that opens a bounded trace session for deterministic logic analyzer capture.
Canonical LOGIC-7 process that captures one deterministic logic-analyzer sample tick for an active trace session.
Canonical LOGIC-7 process that finalizes a bounded logic trace artifact for provenance-friendly storage and compaction.
Canonical LOGIC-8 process that activates a declared deterministic fault on a logic edge, node, or element.
Canonical LOGIC-8 process that deactivates a deterministic logic fault without mutating runtime state directly.
Canonical LOGIC-4 process that evaluates one validated LogicNetworkGraph in deterministic Sense/Compute/Commit/Propagate order.
Canonical LOGIC-4 commit-phase process that serializes explicit state-vector updates for deterministic logic evaluation.
Deterministic EMB-0 body-input process for primitive embodiment movement intent integration.
Deterministic EMB-0 body tick process for gravity coupling, damping, and momentum-to-position integration.
